items.title:
Fable is officially back, worldwide 🌏

Can now access it through the likes of Claude Code / Cowork / Design, as well as our API.

We're also giving promo access to our subscription plans through July
items.snippet:
Fable is officially back, worldwide 🌏

Can now access it through the likes of Claude Code / Cowork / Design, as well as our API.

We're also giving promo access to our subscription plans through July 7, where Fable is included within 50% of your weekly caps.

Happy Fabling!

items.snippet:
Seeing chatter about Fable 5 being accessible - can say categorically this is false, we are not serving any Fable / Mythos traffic

Looking into possibility of UI bug on front-end (e.g. based on historical context), but also very real chance it’s just people shitposting…

items.title:
From today, we’re doubling Claude Code’s 5-hour rate limits on Pro, Max, Team, seat-based Enterprise. 

We’re also getting rid of the peak-hour rate limit cut we made on Pro and Max a few weeks ago.

Two attacks in two days. This is really bad. Disagree all you want on AI or any specific company, but violence like this is unacceptable. 

Hoping @sama and his family get through this okay, and that
items.snippet:
Two attacks in two days. This is really bad. Disagree all you want on AI or any specific company, but violence like this is unacceptable. 

Hoping @sama and his family get through this okay, and that the temperature cools down asap. https://t.co/dYz0kfPHov
